prompt: Create a professional technical document in Confluence TEAM space titled 'API Migration Guide'. It should have a table of contents, an overview info panel, sections for Background, Migration Steps (with code blocks), and a Troubleshooting section with expand/collapse for each issue. Use --body-file since it'll be long.
assertions: Loads the create-confluence-document sub-skill or references confluence-formatting.md
Builds storage format HTML body containing ac:structured-macro for toc
Includes an ac:structured-macro with ac:name='info' for the overview panel
Includes ac:structured-macro with ac:name='code' for code blocks
Includes ac:structured-macro with ac:name='expand' for troubleshooting items
Writes the HTML body to a temporary file
Uses confluence.mjs create-page with --body-file flag (not --body for long content)
Uses --space TEAM in the create command
